title: ffuf
html:
ffuf

Flexible fuzzer for directories, vhosts, parameters, and more. Use FUZZ keyword as placeholder.

Directory Brute-Force

# Basic directory scan
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-directories.txt

# With extensions
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-words.txt -e .php,.asp,.aspx,.html,.txt,.bak

# Recursive scanning
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w /usr/share/wordlists/dirb/common.txt -recursion -recursion-depth 2

# Specific status codes only
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -mc 200,301,302,403

Virtual Host (Vhost) Enumeration

# Subdomain/vhost fuzzing
ffuf -u http://target -H "Host: FUZZ.target.htb" -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/DNS/subdomains-top1million-5000.txt

# Filter by response size (find the baseline size first, then exclude it)
ffuf -u http://target -H "Host: FUZZ.target.htb" -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/DNS/subdomains-top1million-20000.txt -fs 4242

# Filter by word count
ffuf -u http://target -H "Host: FUZZ.target.htb" -w wordlist.txt -fw 100

Parameter Fuzzing

# GET parameter names
ffuf -u "http://target/page?FUZZ=test" -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/burp-parameter-names.txt

# GET parameter values
ffuf -u "http://target/page?id=FUZZ" -w /usr/share/seclists/Fuzzing/LFI/LFI-Jhaddix.txt

# POST parameter names
ffuf -u http://target/login -X POST -d "FUZZ=test" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -w /usr/share/seclists/Discovery/Web-Content/burp-parameter-names.txt

# POST parameter values
ffuf -u http://target/login -X POST -d "username=admin&password=FUZZ" -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded" -w /usr/share/wordlists/rockyou.txt

# JSON POST body
ffuf -u http://target/api -X POST -d '{"username":"FUZZ"}' -H "Content-Type: application/json" -w wordlist.txt

Multiple Fuzz Points

# Two wordlists (clusterbomb mode by default)
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ1/FUZZ2 -w wordlist1.txt:FUZZ1 -w wordlist2.txt:FUZZ2

# Username:password brute (pitchfork mode)
ffuf -u http://target/login -X POST -d "user=USER&pass=PASS" -w users.txt:USER -w passwords.txt:PASS -mode pitchfork

Filtering & Matching

# Filter by status code (exclude)
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -fc 404,403

# Filter by response size
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -fs 0

# Filter by word count
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -fw 42

# Filter by line count
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -fl 10

# Filter by regex
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -fr "Not Found"

# Match specific status codes
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -mc 200,301

# Match by response size
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -ms 1234

# Auto-calibrate filtering (detect and filter baseline)
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -ac

Speed & Performance

# Thread count (default 40)
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -t 100

# Rate limit (requests per second)
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -rate 50

# Timeout per request
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -timeout 5

Output

# Save results
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -o results.json -of json

# Other formats: csv, html, md, all
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -o results.csv -of csv

Authentication & Headers

# Cookie auth
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -b "session=abc123"

# Bearer token
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -H "Authorization: Bearer TOKEN"

# Custom headers
ffuf -u http://target/FUZZ -w wordlist.txt -H "X-Forwarded-For: 127.0.0.1"

Common Wordlists (SecLists)

Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-words.txt          - general purpose
Discovery/Web-Content/raft-medium-directories.txt     - directories
Discovery/Web-Content/directory-list-2.3-medium.txt   - classic dirb list
Discovery/Web-Content/common.txt                      - quick common paths
Discovery/DNS/subdomains-top1million-5000.txt          - vhost/subdomain (fast)
Discovery/DNS/subdomains-top1million-20000.txt         - vhost/subdomain (thorough)
Discovery/Web-Content/burp-parameter-names.txt         - parameter names
Fuzzing/LFI/LFI-Jhaddix.txt                           - LFI paths
